name: Cheery Cherry Bread- Crockpot
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cherries and reserve 1/3 cup of syrup. Cut cherries into pieces (about 1/2 cup).
2. In a bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
3. In another bowl, beat eggs and sugar until thick and fluffy.
4. Alternately add the dry ingredients and reserved cherry syrup to the egg mixture, mixing well after each addition.
5. Mix in cherries and pecans.
6. Grease and flour a 9x13 inch baking pan or a 2-pound coffee can.
7. Place the batter into the prepared pan and cover with a lid or wrap tightly with six layers of paper towels.
8. Set the covered pan in the crockpot.
9. Cook on high for 2-3 hours, or until set.
10. Remove from the crockpot and let cool for 10 minutes before cutting out of the pan.
